keys.social_auth_disabled: Google sign-in is not available yet. Use email verification to continue.
keys.google_not_configured: Google sign-in is not available right now. Use email verification to continue.
keys.oauth_config: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable. Try again later or use email verification.
keys.invalid_state: Sign-in session expired. Please try Google sign-in again.
keys.missing_code: Google did not return an authorization code. Please try again.
keys.token_exchange: Could not complete sign-in with Google. Try again or use email verification.
keys.no_access_token: Google sign-in did not return a token. Please try again.
keys.zuplo_session: Could not create your session. Try again or use email verification.
keys.no_jwt: Authentication service returned an invalid response. Contact support.
keys.signInFailedGeneric: Sign-in failed. Try again or use email verification.
keys.signInFailedWithCode: Sign-in failed ({code}). Try again or use email verification.
